mapper.sql: coalesce(r.post_time, r.create_time) >= concat(#{beginDate}, ' 00:00:00') and coalesce(r.post_time, r.create_time) <= concat(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59')
mapper.select:
select p.proj_id as projId, p.proj_no as projNo, p.proj_name as projName, ifnull(p.contract_amount, 0) as contractAmount, ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) as totalBudget, ifnull(sum(case when then r.amount else 0 end), 0) as actualCost, ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) - ifnull(sum(case when then r.amount else 0 end), 0) as budgetBalance, ifnull(p.contract_amount, 0) - ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) as profitMargin, case when ifnull(p.total_budget, 0) = 0 then 0 else round(ifnull(sum(case when then r.amount else 0 end), 0) / p.total_budget * 100, 2) end as execRate from proj_info p left join cost_posting_record r on r.proj_id = p.proj_id where p.del_flag = '0'
group by p.proj_id, p.proj_no, p.proj_name, p.contract_amount, p.total_budget order by execRate desc, p.create_time desc

select p.proj_id as projId, p.proj_name as projName, coalesce(root.category_id, category.category_id, a.category_id) as rootCategoryId, coalesce(root.category_name, category.category_name, a.category_name, '未分类') as rootCategoryName, case when category.parent_id is not null and category.parent_id != 0 then category.category_id else null end as childCategoryId, case when category.parent_id is not null and category.parent_id != 0 then category.category_name else '' end as childCategoryName, ifnull(sum(distinct a.allocation_amount), 0) as budgetAmount, ifnull(sum(case when then r.amount else 0 end), 0) as actualCost, ifnull(sum(distinct a.allocation_amount), 0) - ifnull(sum(case when then r.amount else 0 end), 0) as budgetBalance, case when ifnull(sum(distinct a.allocation_amount), 0) = 0 then 0 else round(ifnull(sum(case when then r.amount else 0 end), 0) / sum(distinct a.allocation_amount) * 100, 2) end as execRate from proj_cost_allocation a inner join proj_info p on p.proj_id = a.proj_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join sys_cost_category category on category.category_id = a.category_id and category.del_flag = '0' left join sys_cost_category root on root.category_id = case when ifnull(category.parent_id, 0) = 0 then category.category_id else category.parent_id end and root.del_flag = '0' left join cost_posting_record r on r.proj_id = a.proj_id and r.node_id = a.node_id and r.category_id = a.category_id where a.del_flag = '0'
and (coalesce(root.category_id, category.category_id, a.category_id) in #{categoryId} or a.category_id in #{categoryId})
group by p.proj_id, p.proj_name, coalesce(root.category_id, category.category_id, a.category_id), coalesce(root.category_name, category.category_name, a.category_name, '未分类'), case when category.parent_id is not null and category.parent_id != 0 then category.category_id else null end, case when category.parent_id is not null and category.parent_id != 0 then category.category_name else '' end order by p.proj_name asc, rootCategoryName asc, childCategoryName asc

select
r.proj_id as projId, coalesce(p.proj_no, '') as projNo, coalesce(p.proj_name, r.proj_name) as projName,
null as projId, null as projNo, null as projName,
coalesce(root.category_id, category.category_id, r.category_id) as categoryId, coalesce(root.category_name, category.category_name, r.category_name, '未分类') as categoryName,
null as categoryId, null as categoryName,
r.node_id as nodeId, coalesce(node.node_name, r.node_name) as nodeName,
null as nodeId, null as nodeName,
date_format(coalesce(r.post_time, r.create_time), '%Y-%m') as postingMonth,
null as postingMonth,
count(1) as recordCount, ifnull(sum(r.amount), 0) as amount from cost_posting_record r left join proj_info p on p.proj_id = r.proj_id and p.del_flag = '0' left join proj_wbs_node node on node.node_id = r.node_id and node.del_flag = '0' left join sys_cost_category category on category.category_id = r.category_id and category.del_flag = '0' left join sys_cost_category root on root.category_id = case when ifnull(category.parent_id, 0) = 0 then category.category_id else category.parent_id end and root.del_flag = '0'
group by
r.proj_id, coalesce(p.proj_no, ''), coalesce(p.proj_name, r.proj_name), coalesce(root.category_id, category.category_id, r.category_id), coalesce(root.category_name, category.category_name, r.category_name, '未分类'), r.node_id, coalesce(node.node_name, r.node_name), date_format(coalesce(r.post_time, r.create_time), '%Y-%m'),
order by postingMonth asc, projName asc, categoryName asc, nodeName asc limit #{limit}
select proj_id as value, concat(proj_no, ' ', proj_name) as label from proj_info where del_flag = '0' order by create_time desc
select category_id as value, category_name as label from sys_cost_category where del_flag = '0' and status = '0' and category_level = 1 order by order_num asc, category_id asc

select n.node_id as value, concat(p.proj_no, ' / ', n.node_name) as label, n.proj_id as projId from proj_wbs_node n inner join proj_info p on p.proj_id = n.proj_id and p.del_flag = '0' where n.del_flag = '0' order by p.create_time desc, n.node_id asc
select distinct post_by as value, post_by as label from cost_posting_record where post_by is not null and post_by != '' order by post_by asc
